title: AI and the Job Market in 2026
summary: AWS Developers discusses job hunting strategies in 2026 as AI screening becomes standard. The video argues that networking and personal branding remain valuable, junior developers still bring real value to teams, and that jobs evolve rather than disappear entirely.
writeup: This AWS Developers video examines job hunting in 2026 as AI screening becomes a standard part of hiring. It matters because the screening shift changes how candidates reach teams, and the discussion centers on what still carries weight: networking and personal branding. The argument holds that junior developers continue to bring real value to teams, and that jobs evolve rather than disappear entirely.
